name: XMarket
facts: Private Beta launched on BNB Chain mainnet February 27, 2026
Creator-focused prediction market: anyone can create markets and earn up to 50% of trading fees
Pre-sale investment model for market backers (unique in space)
CLOB model (not AMM): tighter spreads, better pricing, no impermanent loss
APAC-focused: Korea, Vietnam, Southeast Asia (BNB Chain's strongest user base)
Running $20K USDT Beta Aura Sprint prize pool

relationships.relationship: same team; XMarket = spot prediction, LEVER = leverage layer
direct competitor on BNB Chain (Opinion has $653M weekly volume, YZi Labs backed)
